channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Duffy Announces First Live Show in 15 Years
item.description: 🎤 Duffy is back and hitting the stage! 🙌 Get ready for an unforgettable comeback concert! 🌟 #DuffyReturns #LiveMusicMagic

item.title: Pitfest Cut Short After Fan Dies
item.description: Sending love to our metal community 🤘 Let's keep each other safe at shows! #MusicFamily #StaySafe 🖤

item.title: Watch Ariana Grande Launch Her First Tour Since 2019
item.description: 🌟 Ariana Grande is hitting the stage again! 🎤 Who's ready for this pop princess to slay on tour? 💃 #ArianaGrande #TourLife

item.title: O-Rod Debuts Robert Smith Collab At Primavera
item.description: 🎸 O-Rod just rocked the stage with a surprise collab featuring Robert Smith at Primavera! 🌟 Who else is loving this unexpected duo? 🎶 #MusicNews

item.title: Gorillaz Introduced by Palestinian Activist at Primavera Sound
item.description: 🎶 Gorillaz get a powerful intro from a Palestinian activist at Primavera Sound! Music and activism unite on stage 🙌 #Gorillaz #PrimaveraSound #MusicNews
